sentences.english: Our school has different bins for recycling.
sentences.korean: 학교에 재활용을 위한 다른 통들이 있어요.

sentences.english: There is one for paper and one for plastic and one for cans.
sentences.korean: 종이용 하나 플라스틱용 하나 캔용 하나가 있어요.

sentences.english: Every class takes turns cleaning the recycling area.
sentences.korean: 모든 반이 돌아가며 재활용 구역을 청소해요.

sentences.english: Our teacher says recycling is important for the environment.
I try to use less plastic at home too.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
